blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the installation process, including signature capture and photo documentation, is not supported by any concrete API reads or persisted state checks. The evidence provided does not include any direct validation of the mobile signature capture functionality or the linking of photos to signatures, which are critical for confirming the requirement. As a result, the exploratory step is blocked due to a lack of necessary evidence to assert a definitive conclusion.
